summary: User testing validation for broadcast-infrastructure milestone completed successfully. All 2 testable assertions passed. VAL-BROADCAST-001 verified the BroadcastThreadPatch schema correctly includes 'delivery-loop' as a valid refetch target. VAL-UI-006 verified the thread-patch-cache properly invalidates the delivery-loop status query when patches include delivery-loop refetch targets. Services were started successfully (PostgreSQL and Redis).
